message:
feat(tracing): add tracing crate as optional dependency (asupersync-bnf6)

Add tracing integration behind a feature flag for zero-cost when disabled:

- Add 'tracing-integration' feature flag to Cargo.toml
- Add tracing v0.1 as optional dependency
- Create src/tracing_compat.rs with:
  - Re-exports from tracing crate when feature enabled
  - No-op macros (trace!, debug!, info!, warn!, error!) when disabled
  - No-op span types (NoopSpan, NoopGuard) for API compatibility
  - No-op Level constants and Instrument trait
- Update lib.rs with module declaration and documentation

When disabled, all tracing macros compile to nothing for zero runtime
overhead. When enabled, provides full tracing functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,11 @@ categories = ["asynchronous", "concurrency"]
 # Enable internal test helpers for integration tests.
 # This exposes private APIs like Cx::new() and is NOT for production use.
 test-internals = []
+# Enable tracing integration for structured logging and spans.
+# When disabled, tracing macros compile to no-ops for zero overhead.
+tracing-integration = ["dep:tracing"]
+# Enable proc macros for structured concurrency (scope!, spawn!, join!, race!)
+proc-macros = ["dep:asupersync-macros"]
 
 [lib]
 path = "src/lib.rs"
@@ -32,6 +37,10 @@ serde_json = "1.0"
 # NOTE: bincode 1.3.3 is marked unmaintained (RustSec-2025-0141) but stable.
 # Consider migration to postcard in future. See UPGRADE_LOG.md for details.
 bincode = "1.3"
+# Optional tracing integration - only compiled when tracing-integration feature is enabled
+tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
+# Optional proc macros for structured concurrency
+asupersync-macros = { path = "asupersync-macros", optional = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.6"
